ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medical_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical event */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the medical event (e.g., preventive, emergency, chronic) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the medical event (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "typical_duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the medical event (e.g., 1 day, 1 week) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the medical event the service is associated with */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., consultation, surgery, therapy) */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the service (e.g., cardiology, dermatology) */,
  "is_covered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is covered by insurance */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Maximum coverage limit for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES medical_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service the cost is associated with */,
  "in_network_cost" REAL /* Cost for using an in-network provider */,
  "out_of_network_cost" REAL /* Cost for using an out-of-network provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes about the costs */,
  "copay_amount" REAL /* Copay amount for the service */,
  "deductible_amount" REAL /* Deductible amount for the service */,
  "coinsurance_percentage" REAL /* Coinsurance percentage for the service */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the cost structure becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "limitations" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each limitation entry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service the limitation is associated with */,
  "limitations_and_exceptions" TEXT /* Detailed limitations and exceptions for the service */,
  "frequency_limit" TEXT /* Limit on the frequency of service usage (e.g., once per year) */,
  "age_limit" TEXT /* Age restrictions for the service */,
  "preexisting_condition" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service has preexisting condition restrictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_limitations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (in-network or out-of-network) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., clinic, hospital, specialist) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the provider */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the provider */,
  "accepts_new_patients" INTEGER /* Indicates if the provider accepts new patients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)
